channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter bin overflowing on Peckham rye, 27th June
item.description:
On junction with East Dulwich Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th June
item.description:
Fridge freezer dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking cone on pavement, 27th June
item.description:
The pavement outside 30 Elizabeth Way has ‘no parking’ cones used to prevent people parking outside this property. This is in addition to their dropped kerb and they are using this to drive over the pavement and to allow more space to access their driveway. If they need a wider dropped kerb they should apply for one rather than claim space they are not entitled too.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Elizabeth Way, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown bushes blocking the footpath, 27th June
item.description:
There are overgrown trees and bushes from public and private property but they are both blocking the footpath. Same issue 1015 meters up the road on the same side of the road too
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Forburg Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unfinished road markings, 27th June
item.description:
Double yellows recently painted but gap left due to parked cars at time of painting. Gap being exploited by drivers as parking place, rather than missing double yellows that should be there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gervase Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 27th June
item.description:
Dumped car, blocking footpath, rear window open, maybe stolen?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Circus, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 27th June
item.description:
Parked on double yellow for at least two hours, no ticket

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gervase Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left out in the street, 27th June
item.description:
Recycling has been left out on a Saturday but the recycling doesn’t get collected until Thursday. The rubbish has been left by flat A 149 Amhurst road as indicated by the address labels on the rubbish. I reported the same issue a few weeks ago.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing rubbish bin, 27th June
item.description:
Rubbish bin overflowing and creating a bad odour outside shops in between Frankfurt Road and Elfindale Road on Herne Hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th June
item.description:
8 mattresses, 1 toilet, rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 27th June
item.description:
Two weeks ago came home to find shattered glass & suitcases dumped in the road & today (27th June) child's car seat dumped on pavement with car mats & litter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynsted Close, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trailer caravan obstructing traffic flow, 27th June
item.description:
Caravan has now been pitched for a few days, suspect someone is living inside.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelvington Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General fly tipping, Coleman road corner with Wells Way, 27th June
item.description:
Our weekly favourite fly tipping spot Primark bag and black bag by BT box Please add cctv to this spot and catch whoever is doing this… Southwark is just too reactive and not proactive regarding this issue! How much does it cost to keep cleaning this corner?! I’

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the front wall of the Charity Shop, 27th June
item.description:
Graffiti on the front wall of the Charity Shop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Bellegrove Parade, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the entrance to Tesco Express, 27th June
item.description:
Graffiti on the entrance to Tesco Express
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Fly-tipping, 27th June
item.description:
Rubbish dumped including a mattress, bed bases.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haldane Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branch torn off tree, 27th June
item.description:
Big branch torn off tree now on the ground. The trees are continually having branches coming off. Reports have been done in the past, some trees are dying! Branch needs removing please and another survey done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SMALL PoND sluice blocking filter, 27th June
item.description:
At the back of the SMALL pond, the side where path leads from chicanes the filter to front pond is blocked with debris including newspaper, tin can, algae . It needs clearing . This is not the front pond sluice please note

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Hill, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 51 Chesterfield Grove-Flytipping, 27th June
item.description:
Items left on the pavement, causing obstruction. Needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 54 chesterfield Grove- Flytipping, 27th June
item.description:
Item left on the pavement, causing obstruction. Needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
